hero.headline: Stop Losing Clients to Your Competitors' Websites.
hero.subheadline: I help small businesses turn their social media following into a high-converting, professional website that builds trust and drives sales.

about.headline: Hi, I'm your technical partner.
about.copy: I'm a Computer Engineering student from Mexico with a passion for building world-class web experiences. I combine rock-solid engineering (Python, Java, C++) with beautiful, intuitive design. My goal isn't just to write code—it's to make your business look premium and perform flawlessly.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.description: Turn ad clicks into paying clients with high-converting, single-page experiences.

items.title: Business Websites
items.description: Elevate your brand with a premium digital storefront that establishes immediate trust.

items.title: Scalable Infrastructure
items.description: Future-proof your business with custom digital infrastructure that handles scheduling, payments, and client management as you grow.
